transcript.text:
4 servings of Spicy Rice Cake
Spicy Chewy Noodles, Ramyun Noodles, Fishcake
7 tempuras
3 orders of fried rice
3 ciders
1 bowl of Spicy Chewy Noodles
[Headache]
Hello everyone~
I am here at Guidong today
There's this place called Modoorang
I heard that all the locals know about this place
So I'm here
It's 3:30pm right now
I thought it would be empty
But it's crowded
This place is famous Best fried rice

Their fried rice is delicious
We compete with flavors
[Crowded even if it's not at a peak hour]
This is the menu
I guess you color it in
Let's just order 4 servings to get started
You can choose the level of spiciness
I'll go with the original
With a side of chewy noodles
Ramyun noodles as well
Boiled egg, seaweed roll, dumplings too
They give you fresh ingredients
Even the tempura
That's cool It's been a while since I had the Cheese Spicy Rice Cake
It's starting to boil
The pot is pretty big

I'll try the soup
Just a little bit
Yum
Sweet and spicy
It's an instant spicy rice cake
It's very textbook-like
That looks good
I added the noodles
This is my first instant spicy rice cake mukbang
It's my first time eating this after middle school
Let's lower the heat
I think it's ready now
1 order of the cheese-filled rice cake was 3,500 Won (~$3.21 USD)
This is the regular
It's so squishy
That's good

The regular one tastes better I think
It's really soft
Really squirmy and fluffy
Soft
Ugly dumplings.. let's eat it
It's big
Let's split it in half
That looks chewy and delicious
Well the tempuras are not crispy because of the sauce
The glass noodles inside are chewy and tasty
I was told that their chewy noodles were good
I ordered both anyways
I only see Ramyun noodles though
Everything is good with this sauce
I've only had the instant spicy rice cake a couple of times, but this is by far the best one
Fried seaweed roll

Let's cut it in half since it's big
I burned my mouth
I'm going to cry
Boiled egg is a must when you eat this
Get some sauce on it
Smash it
Looks good
Put it on your spoon
I should've ordered more eggs
I would've been a regular here if I went to school nearby
I was told there are more famous places here
Should I try the Cold Spicy Chewy Noodles?
[A fan dropped off a drink for Tzuyang]
So cute
The flavors are not too strong
You can't eat much spicy rice cake if the flavors are too strong

This isn't like that
Yaki dumplings
Hot
The ugly dumplings were better
Too much flour for the yaki dumplings
And the ugly dumplings had lots of glass noodles
Hot!
I've been cooling it but it's still hot
Fishcake and the rice cake
It's very standard
Sweet and spicy rice cake
Ugly dumplings
Take this
And some soup
That's good
But

The original tastes good, but I think it'll be better with a little more spice
This isn't spicy at all for me
I feel like 1 level spicier will be better
She's so good at eating
I'm going to fall backward
That's probably why so many people watch her
I should've ordered 6 servings
Darn it
This is all stuck together
I can't add more here
Let's do 3 orders of fried rice
And cold spicy chewy noodles
Their spicy rice cake was good, but their fried rice will be better than this?
You're pouring all the ingredients in Is it usually like this?
Yes
This tastes better than the spicy rice cake? Yes

I can make it like this
Thank you
I went to this cheese rice place before to do mukbang
It's very similar to that
But this one is more nutty and savory
That's tasty
I thought no other place would beat that place
This is better
Thank you
That's a good amount
You can't go wrong with this
The food here is not salty
I don't really eat fried rice after eating a dish
But this is mandatory
I can taste a lot of the corn and the sesame seeds
They don't skimp you out on the ingredients

This is like half rice half corn
It's my first time seeing anyone eating this much
In my 38 years of business
4 servings of spicy rice cake
cold chewy noodles, ramyun noodles, fishcake
7 tempuras
3 fried rice
3 ciders
1 cold spicy chewy noodles
[Headache]
Now I'll start watching your videos
Thank you
I don't watch mukbangs
1 last bite left
Aren't you full?
I'm okay

Okay?
You can eat more? Yes
Shocking
The last time I had the instant spicy rice cake was back in middle school
It was one of the best I ever had
It was a very traditional taste that brought back memories
Thanks everyone~
Amazing
